base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of zelda_captive_idle — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Princess Zelda (rescued) — pink dress, crown. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Princess Zelda (rescued) — pink dress, crown; appears in Level 9 Death Mountain inner chamber after Ganon defeat. Rescue-cutscene only
